title: Add vacation tracking feature to Workload utilisation
excerpt: It would be a great feature if Monday.com could have the ability to track team members’ vacation days in a board, and feed this information into the Workload/Gantt chart widgets to prevent tasks being assigned during vac…

posts.author: leemurphy (Lee Murphy)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be a great feature if Monday.com could have the ability to track team members’ vacation days in a board, and feed this information into the Workload/Gantt chart widgets to prevent tasks being assigned during vacation days and show that the maximum utilisation is reduced where a vacation day exists. Similar behaviour to when public holidays are accounted for in the workload widget when populated in schedules.
